creator: rakuco@FreeBSD.org
text:
OK, I've rebuilt world here with your patch, but got the same error when installing it with MK_SYSTEM_COMPILER=no.

FWIW, when I launched `make buildworld' on my beefy machine, it output a message at the beginning:

> make[1]: "/usr/src/Makefile.inc1" line 146: SYSTEM_COMPILER: Determined that CC=cc matches the source tree.  Not bootstrapping a cross-compiler.

And there's no /usr/obj/usr/src/tmp/usr/bin/cc in there.
